## Intellectual property

All content on this site (texts, images, logos) is the exclusive property of Atelier d'Ailes. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior authorization.

The photographs and illustrations on this site are used with the permission of their authors or come from royalty-free image banks.

## Personal data protection

This site is purely informational and does not collect any personal data. No contact form is present on the site and no cookies are used.

For any questions, you can contact us directly by phone at the details indicated above.
